code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut c = 0
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
            i = i + 1
          else
            c = b
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      if c == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if c == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut digits = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(input, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b >= 48 and b <= 57
              val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
              digits = digits + 1
              i = i + 1
            else
              reading = false
            end
          when None
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      if digits == 0
        i = i + 1
      else
        let num = val * sign
        if num % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + num
        end
      end
    end
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
